title: AFKZonePRO
description: A plugin which rewards people for being away from keyboard on your server with in-game rewards
body:
# AFK Rewards System: The Ultimate Player Idle Management Solution

Transform your server's downtime into exciting opportunities with this premium AFK rewards system! Create designated zones where players can receive automatic benefits while they're away from their keyboard.

## Key Features:

🔹 **Custom AFK Zones**: Easily create multiple AFK areas throughout your server using the intuitive selection wand. Simply mark two corners, name your zone, and you're ready to go!

🔹 **Dual Reward System**: Implement both guaranteed and chance-based rewards to keep things interesting:
  - Guaranteed rewards delivered at set intervals
  - Surprise bonus rewards with customizable probability rates

🔹 **Complete Command Control**: Configure any server command as a reward, from item drops to permissions, currency additions, and more. The %player% placeholder automatically targets the correct user.

🔹 **Real-time Zone Notifications**: Players receive immediate feedback when entering or leaving AFK zones, creating a seamless experience.

🔹 **Admin Management Tools**: Comprehensive command suite for zone creation, listing, and removal, all secured behind proper permission systems.

🔹 **Highly Configurable**: Fine-tune every aspect of your AFK system through the detailed configuration file, setting different rules for each zone.

## Perfect For:

- Server owners looking to increase player retention and engagement
- Communities that want to reward loyal players even during downtime
- Economies that benefit from controlled resource distribution
- Any server seeking to add value to player idle time

The system automatically tracks player time spent in zones and intelligently processes rewards even if players log off and return. The lightweight design ensures minimal server impact while maintaining powerful functionality.

Stop letting player AFK time go to waste! Install today and transform idle moments into rewarding experiences that keep your community excited to stay connected.~~~~
